reports.title: Causal Chain (last 6 hops)
reports.query: MATCH path=(e1:Event {run_id: $neodash_run_id})-[:CAUSED*1..6]->(e2:Event) WHERE NOT ()-[:CAUSED]->(e1) RETURN path LIMIT 50

reports.title: Machines by Failure Count
reports.query: MATCH (m:Machine {run_id: $neodash_run_id})-[:HAD_EVENT]->(e:Event) WHERE e.new_state IN ['FAILED','UNDER_REPAIR'] RETURN m.name AS Machine, count(e) AS Failures ORDER BY Failures DESC

reports.title: SPC Violation Chains
reports.query: MATCH (e1:Event {run_id: $neodash_run_id})-[:CAUSED {type:'spc_quality_impact'}]->(e2:Event) RETURN e1.sim_time AS ViolationTime, e2.sim_time AS ImpactTime, e2.new_state AS Outcome LIMIT 100

reports.title: Events per Shift
reports.query: MATCH (r:Run {run_id: $neodash_run_id})-[:HAD_SHIFT]->(s:Shift)<-[:OCCURRED_IN]-(e:Event) RETURN s.name AS Shift, count(e) AS Events ORDER BY s.number

reports.title: Runs
reports.query: MATCH (r:Run) RETURN r.run_id AS RunID, r.scenario AS Scenario, size((r)-[:INCLUDES]->()) AS Nodes ORDER BY r.start_wall_clock DESC
